brief_html: Received when a user is inviting you to join their clan.
format:
(UINT32) Cookie
(UINT32) Clan tag
(STRING) Clan name
(STRING) Inviter's username
remarks_html:
Received when a user is inviting you to join their clan.

To accept or decline, you must respond with C>S 0x79 SID_CLANINVITATIONRESPONSE.
